headline: JPMorgan Resumes Fifth Third (FITB) Coverage with Overweight, Raises Target
summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) is included among the 15 Best Safe Dividend Stocks for 2026. On March 16, JPMorgan analyst Vivek Juneja resumed coverage of Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) with an Overweight rating. The firm also set a price target of $50.50, raised from $45, after a period of restriction. In a research note, the […]

headline: Fifth Third Introduces Cash Flow and Spending Insights to Help Customers Take Control of Their Finances
summary: CINCINNATI, March 17, 2026--Managing day‑to‑day expenses while planning for the future has become increasingly complex for many households. Recent data shows only 63% of U.S. adults could cover a $400 emergency expense with cash or its equivalent, and 70% report challenges with fundamental financial indicators such as spending vs. income and bill payment.
